# LAM (Latent Action Model) training dependencies
# Install with: pip install -r requirements.txt
#
# For PyTorch with specific CUDA version, install torch+torchvision FIRST:
#   pip install torch torchvision --index-url https://download.pytorch.org/whl/cu128
# Then install the rest:
#   pip install -r requirements.txt

# Core training
lightning>=2.6.0
einops>=0.8.0
numpy>=2.0
tqdm>=4.60

# Vision / video I/O
opencv-python>=4.10
Pillow>=12.0
torchvision

# Logging
tensorboard>=2.18
wandb>=0.25

# Evaluation metrics
piq>=0.8
lpips>=0.1.4
torchmetrics>=1.8
pytorch-msssim>=1.0
transformers>=4.51  # CLIP for FID-like metrics
